description_long: This is a metallic kettle with a rounded, bowl-like body and a polished, reflective surface. It features two prominent, side-mounted handles that extend horizontally and curve slightly, providing a secure grip. The kettle stands on a short, circular footed base that elevates it above the surface. The rim is smooth and continuous, with no visible spout or lid, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The surface is plain, without any decorative engravings or patterns, and the overall construction suggests durability and functionality. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids, and the metallic finish gives it a sleek, modern look.
description: A polished, metallic kettle with side-mounted handles and a footed base, featuring a plain, reflective surface and no visible spout or lid.
description_view_0: Side view showing both horizontally extended handles and the rounded body with a footed base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the handles and the smooth, reflective surface of the kettle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying both handles and the bowl-like body.
description_view_3: Angled view similar to view 1, emphasizing the handle design and the seamless rim.
